primary_source.title: Interacting Scalar Fields as Dark Energy and Dark Matter in Einstein scalar Gauss Bonnet Gravity

validated_content_summary: Studies a Gauss-Bonnet-coupled scalar field for dark energy interacting with a coherent scalar field for dark matter.
Fixes gravitational-wave speed to unity for observational consistency.
Compares against Pantheon+, DES-SN5YR / DES-Dovekie, and Roman mock data.
Reports Lambda-CDM-like behavior for Pantheon+ and DES samples, with higher-redshift departure when Roman mock data are included.
negative_use_lock: not evidence for P vs NP

additional_source_classification.classification: low-trust/speculative external hypothesis source only; not proof evidence
topological Einstein gravity / Kodaira-Spencer gravity source; not dark-sector scalar-field cosmology comparator
general observational-gravity news source; not dark-sector scalar-field comparator
